videoSnippet.title: The Candidates Tournament Approaches! || Hikaru vs Awonder || Training Match 2026

Nakamura, Hikaru (2810) - Liang, Awonder (2719)
Nakamura - Liang Training Match (Chess.com) [01] 2026.03.13
C50 Giuoco Pianissimo

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 Bc5 4.d3 d6 5.c3 h6 6.a4 Bb6 7.Nbd2 Nge7 8.b4 a6 9.Bb3 O-O 10.Nc4 Ba7 11.Be3 Kh8 12.b5 Bxe3 13.fxe3 Nb8 14.O-O Be6 15.Rb1 axb5 16.axb5 Nd7 17.d4 Ng6 18.Ncd2 Qe7 19.Qc2 Nf6 20.Bxe6 Qxe6 21.b6 c6 22.Ra1 Nd7 23.Ra7 Rab8 24.Rb1 Ne7 25.Qb3 d5 26.exd5 cxd5 27.e4 Rfc8 28.Ra5 Qg6 29.Nxe5 Nxe5 30.dxe5 Qg5 31.Nf1 dxe4 32.Rb5 Qg6 33.Re1 Qc6 34.Ng3 Qxc3 35.Qxc3 Rxc3 36.Nxe4 Rc2 37.Rc5 Rxc5 38.Nxc5 Nd5 39.e6 fxe6 40.Rxe6 Rc8 41.Nxb7 Rb8 42.Nc5 Rxb6 43.Rxb6 Nxb6
